name: Relaxed oversized button-down shirt + wide-leg trousers Korean lounge set
why: I love this one because it looks effortless but has that polished Korean aesthetic. The oversized button-down with wide-leg trousers — it's like wearing pajamas that happen to look chic. The neutral beige tones are perfect. This is the kind of thing I'd wear on a Sunday morning when I'm not going anywhere but still want to feel like myself. Soft, relaxed, a little bit sexy without trying. The kind of outfit Fernando would say looks cute on me.
